tier_1_critical.name: taste-skill
tier_1_critical.creator: Leon Lin (Leonxlnx)
tier_1_critical.what_it_does: High-Agency Frontend skill collection. 7 sub-skills (taste, output, soft, minimalist, brutalist, redesign, stitch) with 3 tunable dials (DESIGN_VARIANCE, MOTION_INTENSITY, VISUAL_DENSITY). Stops AI from generating boring generic slop.
tier_1_critical.note: ALWAYS install. Base anti-slop ruleset for every project. Not an aesthetic opinion — it bans bad patterns and enforces premium ones via tunable dials.

tier_1_critical.name: anthropic-frontend-design
tier_1_critical.creator: Anthropic
tier_1_critical.what_it_does: Official Anthropic front-end design skill. Base skill that many creators modify. Polished web designs avoiding common cliches.
tier_1_critical.note: One of the three aesthetic-opinion candidates. Pick ONE per project: this, mager, or UIUX Pro Max. Never stack with another aesthetic-opinion skill.

tier_1_critical.name: cc-nano-banana
tier_1_critical.creator: kkoppenhaver
tier_1_critical.what_it_does: Integrates NanoBanana via Gemini CLI directly inside Claude Code. Text-to-image, image editing, photo restoration, icons, patterns.
tier_1_critical.note: Install if GEMINI_API_KEY is set. Not an aesthetic opinion — it's the image-generation tool. Safe to co-install with any aesthetic skill.

tier_2_specialized.name: video-to-website
tier_2_specialized.creator: Nate Herk
tier_2_specialized.what_it_does: Scroll-driven animated 3D websites. Self-improving (gets better with every build).

tier_2_specialized.name: nate-front-end-design
tier_2_specialized.creator: Nate Herk
tier_2_specialized.what_it_does: Modified version of Anthropic's front-end design skill, optimized for animated product landing pages.

tier_2_specialized.name: 3d-website-builder
tier_2_specialized.creator: Jack Roberts
tier_2_specialized.what_it_does: Scroll-stop websites with animated 3D product sections. Skill creator integration for custom prompts.

tier_2_specialized.name: asset-generation
tier_2_specialized.creator: Jack Roberts
tier_2_specialized.what_it_does: Generates optimized NanoBanana prompts. Pairs with 3D Website Builder skill.

tier_2_specialized.name: apple-level-blueprint
tier_2_specialized.creator: Ed Hill
tier_2_specialized.what_it_does: Complete agent setup: brand.json + animation → full website. Auto quality checklist, reprompts on bad images.

tier_2_specialized.name: uiux-pro-max
tier_2_specialized.creator: Chase AI / community
tier_2_specialized.what_it_does: UX strategist with Design System Generator. Industry-specific design ideas, back-and-forth UX refinement.

tier_3_community.name: mager/frontend-design
tier_3_community.creator: mager
tier_3_community.what_it_does: Personal design taste as a skill. Dark mode, JetBrains Mono + Space Grotesk, neon accents, hover micro-interactions. Generate new UI, restyle existing code, provide design guidance.
tier_3_community.note: Pick as the SINGLE aesthetic opinion skill only when the vibe matches. Do not stack with other aesthetic-opinion skills.

tier_3_community.name: designer-skills
tier_3_community.creator: MC Dean (Owl-Listener)
tier_3_community.what_it_does: 63 design skills + 27 commands. 8 plugins: research, systems, strategy, UI, interaction, prototyping, design ops, toolkit utilities.
tier_3_community.note: Heavy bundle — only install when the project specifically calls for research/strategy/design-ops depth beyond taste-skill. Do not co-install with other aesthetic-opinion skills.

tier_3_community.name: typeui-sh
tier_3_community.creator: TypeUI.sh
tier_3_community.install: visit typeui.sh and download theme files
tier_3_community.what_it_does: 48 website theme files as instructions for Claude. Pick a visual style, customize colors/fonts via CLI.

tier_3_community.name: kousen-nanobanana-prompts
tier_3_community.creator: Kousen
tier_3_community.what_it_does: Generates optimized NB2/Pro prompts per Google's official guidance.

tier_3_community.name: accesslint
tier_3_community.creator: community
tier_3_community.what_it_does: WCAG 2.2 accessibility compliance checker. Recommended in Snyk's top 8 Claude skills for UI/UX engineers.
tier_3_community.note: Utility skill — safe to co-install with aesthetic skills because it doesn't touch design rules, only WCAG compliance.

tier_3_community.name: agent-browser
tier_3_community.creator: Vercel Labs
tier_3_community.what_it_does: Rust CLI for browser automation optimized for AI agents. Navigate, screenshot, snapshot accessibility tree, interact with elements via semantic locators (role=button name="Submit"), network interception. Used for automated visual verification and iteration after build + SEO pass.

tier_3_community.name: paper-design-mcp
tier_3_community.creator: Paper.design
tier_3_community.install: claude mcp add paper --transport http http://127.0.0.1:29979/mcp --scope user
tier_3_community.what_it_does: Local MCP server for Paper.design (modern design tool, macOS + Windows). 24 tools for reading/writing design files: get_jsx, get_screenshot, get_computed_styles, write_html, update_styles, create_artboard, etc. Alternative to Figma + Stitch for designers who use Paper.
tier_3_community.requires: Paper Desktop app running with a file open
tier_3_community.note: Only install if the user is actively designing in Paper. Not an aesthetic-opinion skill so it does not conflict with taste-skill or the chosen opinion skill.

tier_3_community.name: leon-furze-astro-skills
tier_3_community.creator: Leon Furze
tier_3_community.what_it_does: Claude Code skill for Astro websites. Design patterns encoded so Claude follows them automatically.

install_order: tier_3_community (install based on vibe archetype, ONE aesthetic opinion only)

preferred.name: wavespeed
preferred.note: Gemini 3 Pro Image is the newest Gemini-family image model. 4K native output means no upscale needed for retina desktop heroes. Cheaper per image than Nano Banana Pro on Wavespeed. Currently Wavespeed-only (not on Kie.ai as of 2026-04).

fallback.name: kie_ai
fallback.note: Battle-tested default, proven across all creator tutorials. Use when Wavespeed key is not set. Excellent at targeted edits via Nano Banana Pro Edit.

image_providers.selection_logic: Prefer Wavespeed Gemini 3 Pro Image if WAVESPEED_API_KEY is set. Fall back to Kie.ai Nano Banana if only KIE_AI_API_KEY is set. Error and prompt the user if neither is set.
image_providers.video_provider_always: kie_ai (Kling 3.0) — Wavespeed does not replace Kie.ai for video in this pipeline
